The professional footballer who played for Kadji Sports Academy as a youth and went on to be the most decorated African player of all time is **George Weah**.

- **Kadji Sports Academy**: Weah was part of the academy, where he developed as a player.
- **Most decorated African player of all time**: Weah holds this title, having won the FIFA World Player of the Year award in 1995 and the Ballon d'Or, becoming the first African player to win both awards.

Thus, the answer is: **George Weah**.
